qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for Compute instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for Compute instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS) is one year, with a one-month wall-time. This aligns with the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation period of April-March.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default duration for Persistent instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: The default duration for Persistent instances under the Rapid Access Service (RAS) is one year and is renewable. This aligns with the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation period of April-March.

qa_pairs.question: How can users request resources through the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Rapid Access Service (RAS)?
qa_pairs.answer: To request resources through the Rapid Access Service (RAS), users need to fill out the online form provided by the Digital Research Alliance of Canada.
